title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Strong thunderstorms are expected today mainly for S Austria, W-C Hungary, E Slovakia, SE Poland.

ENH #1
Austria & Hungary
Very strong thunderstorms are expected for the region with threats such as BIG HAIL, SEVERE WIND GUSTS, & TORNADOES!

The environment for strong thunderstorms is present. MU CAPE is at 1400 - 2500 j/kg, with the highest amount in C Hungary.
Kinematics are also very interesting as both LLS and DLS are very high, allowing thunderstorms to turn superelluar.

ENH #2
Poland & Slovakia
Strong thunderstorm are expected for the highlighted region, but less severe than ENH #1. Possible threats like BIG HAIL, SEVERE WIND GUSTS, and also a small probability of TORNADOES is present.

The environment is also very suitable for stronger thunderstorms as the MU CAPE is around 2000 - 2500 j/kg, with the highest amounts being in C Slovakia.
Kinematically speaking Wind shear for supercells is also present but its much less strong than in ENH#1
